description_long: This bottle features a geometric, angular design with a predominantly white body accented by vibrant pink and magenta highlights. The base and neck are reinforced with polygonal pink panels, giving it a stylized, almost futuristic appearance. The neck tapers upward and is capped with a faceted, matching pink closure. The bottle's surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible branding or text. Its overall form suggests it is lightweight and likely made from plastic. The bottle is free from any visible damage or deformation, and its body is opaque, obscuring any view of the interior.
description: A white bottle with angular pink accents and a faceted pink cap, featuring a smooth, glossy surface and a modern, stylized design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bottle's broad white face, pink polygonal base, and the faceted pink cap.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the angular pink accents along the base and the smooth, uninterrupted white body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the symmetrical pink base panels and the bottle's tapering white back.
description_view_3: Angled view reveals the bottle's geometric contours and the transition between white and pink surfaces.
